name: CC0 Josiah

sheet.name: CC0 Josiah
sheet.background_story:
CC0 Josiah is a well know, extraordinary Artist in the Forsaken Lands! His visual skills and use of all mediums is exceptional. Everything he produces is a masterpiece!
    In addition to his stunning visual creations, CC0 Josiah is a phenomenal storyteller. His stories are legendary and will be told through all of time.
    The Forsaken Lands are blessed to have the beloved and famed CC0 Josiah!
